case_title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. JOSUE DARWIN TORRES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAITNIFF. APPEARANCE BY ALL NAMED DEFENDANTS. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
